purpose: Compile live Theseus/SparkStream evidence into a Genesis-style typed artifact graph so invention, training, governance, and release state become durable and auditable.

core_primitives.name: Artifact Graph
core_primitives.summary: Typed, addressable artifacts and edges preserve invention lineage.

core_primitives.name: Claim Ledger
core_primitives.summary: Truth-bearing claims carry support state, risk, evidence, objections, and usage.

core_primitives.name: Critique Tribunal
core_primitives.summary: Open objections survive the conversation and must be resolved, waived, or disclosed.

core_primitives.name: Patch-Based AI Labor
core_primitives.summary: Autonomous changes remain bounded by proposals, patches, tests, and release gates.

core_primitives.name: Release Manifest
core_primitives.summary: Every release records included artifacts, claims, limitations, gates, and feedback plans.

core_primitives.name: Artifact Debt
core_primitives.summary: Unsupported claims, open critiques, orphan artifacts, and unmeasured deployments become visible debt.

core_primitives.name: Reality Feedback Loop
core_primitives.summary: Benchmarks, deployments, and user outcomes update primitive trust and future workflow choices.

core_primitives.name: Reality Manipulator World Kernel
core_primitives.summary: Raw intent is compiled into eight-limb spells, portal worlds, artifacts, claims, critiques, compile targets, release gates, residuals, and feedback plans.

core_primitives.name: Grimoire Spell Contract
core_primitives.summary: Structured commands use Role, Objective, Context, Constraints, Procedure, Output Contract, Verification, and Failure Behavior so vague intent becomes auditable work.

core_primitives.name: Code Residual Forge
core_primitives.summary: Programming benchmark failures are classified into reusable repair traces, synthesized tests, transfer artifacts, and rotation hints before model growth.

core_primitives.name: Local Code Repair Organism
core_primitives.summary: Code pressure runs consume transfer artifacts through local candidate generation, sandbox tests, patch traces, residual classification, and heredity deltas.

core_primitives.name: Bounded Self-Edit Experiment Lane
core_primitives.summary: Residual clusters become small source-patch experiments with verification and rollback notes instead of broad unsupervised self-modification.

core_primitives.name: Long-Horizon Memory Probe
core_primitives.summary: Compacted autonomy traces are tested for goal recall, fact precision, decoy rejection, and next-action continuity.
